title: crepidiastrixeris surugensis
intro: Crepididastrixeris surugensis, also known as the Japanese fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Japanese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Crepididastrixeris surugensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other illnesses. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
